identity.name: Fidel Perez Rubio
identity.headline: Senior Data Engineer
identity.tagline: Same principles at every scale — infrastructure as code, containerize everything, automate away toil, monitor proactively, and design for reliability so a small team can manage a large surface area.

themes.label: Multi-agent orchestration
themes.summary: Builds production-style agent crews (CrewAI, OpenHands, Hermes) that own end-to-end workflows, not just chat.

themes.label: Self-hosted everything
themes.summary: 30+ services on a 2-node home lab (Raspberry Pi gateway + Ubuntu workhorse) with auto-DNS, backups, wake-on-demand.

themes.label: AI-first internal automation
themes.summary: Treats internal workflows as composable LLM tools rather than hand-rolled scripts. Observability-first agentic loops.

themes.label: Platform reliability uplift
themes.summary: Pattern: take a platform with daily failures and drive to near-zero through IaC, GitOps, decoupling, and proactive monitoring.

themes.label: Greenfield data-platform builds
themes.summary: Designed company-wide big-data infra from scratch for a major European e-commerce retailer; decoupled analytics from a 20-year-old Oracle bottleneck.

themes.label: Infrastructure-as-prompts
themes.summary: Per-target work shipped as declarative YAML + crew prompts; zero-HTML-bytes-per-target microsite system is itself a demo.

projects.title: Agent-company-in-a-box
projects.summary: Generic 4-crew agent platform (research/architecture/development/marketing) running real workloads — including this microsite — without per-customer code.
projects.headline_metric: 4 generic crews, N companies, zero per-company code

projects.title: Production data platform (fintech SaaS)
projects.summary: De facto tech lead. Took a daily-failures pipeline to near-zero incidents and built an agent-driven dev lifecycle (Hermes operator layer · CrewAI crews · LangGraph flows · OpenHands autonomous coder · custom MCP servers · Langfuse observability · GitHub-webhook-triggered) across our Terraform, ArgoCD, and Python/Airflow repos — feature/fix cycle from days/weeks to hours/minutes. Owned infra, ingestion, orchestration, warehouse end-to-end. Led Redshift→Snowflake migration.
projects.headline_metric: Daily pipeline failures → near-zero · feature cycle days→minutes

projects.title: Greenfield data platform — European e-commerce retailer
projects.summary: Built company-wide big-data infrastructure from scratch. Decoupled analytics from a 20-year-old production Oracle DB; eliminated availability risk and slashed costs.

projects.title: Home-lab infrastructure (30+ services, 2 nodes)
projects.summary: Two-node Pi+Ubuntu setup running 30+ containerized services with auto-DNS, backups, rebuilds, wake-on-demand. Self-healing zero-touch.

projects.title: RaspiHub — Docker manager dashboard
projects.summary: Custom dashboard for the home-lab infra: real-time CPU/mem/uptime metrics, container start/stop, app launcher, media-server controls.

projects.title: Food macro tracker
projects.summary: Nutrition app: daily macro targets, food DB, per-item breakdown, total composition. Keto-friendly with net-carb + ketone targets.

projects.title: Todo app
projects.summary: Task manager with nested categories, drag-and-drop, rich edit modal, priority management. Replaces off-the-shelf with a tailored workflow.

projects.title: Reminder manager
projects.summary: Recurring task reminders with configurable intervals, Telegram notifications, countdown + snooze. Used for medication, vehicle inspections, etc.

projects.title: Knowledge cards
projects.summary: Flashcard knowledge-retention app: decks, flip-through study mode, progress tracking.

career_summary.role: Senior Data Engineer · De facto tech lead · AI-driven platform
highlights: Built an agent-driven development lifecycle on top of the data platform — Hermes (operator chat layer) · CrewAI crews (architecture / development / review) · LangGraph flows · OpenHands autonomous coder · custom MCP servers fronting Airflow / Snowflake / EKS / ArgoCD / Datadog · Langfuse for end-to-end LLM observability and evals — triggered by GitHub webhooks across Terraform, ArgoCD, and Python/Airflow repos. Feature/fix cycle compressed from days/weeks to hours/minutes
Daily pipeline failures → near-zero unforced errors
Real-time ingestion: SQS → Lambda → Firehose → S3 → Snowpipe
Full IaC with Terraform, GitOps via ArgoCD, all workloads on EKS

value_props_for_outreach: Ships generic agent platforms; per-target work is config not code.
Takes broken pipelines to near-zero failures via IaC + GitOps + decoupling.
Builds the full vertical: infra → data → app → agent loop.
Operates 30+ services on 2 nodes with no on-call team — leverage is the product.
Treats internal workflows as composable LLM tools, observability-first.
